pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks `wp plugin is-active advanced-custom-fields` and task description specifies this plugin.
setup_task.sh creates category 'Team' and export_result.sh checks for category name 'team'.
export_result.sh statically extracts posts named 'Emily Chen' and 'Marcus Johnson', and verifier.py dynamically checks against these expected values which also exactly match the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically defined employee data. It is verified that the expected plugin is 'advanced-custom-fields', the target category is 'Team', and the expected employee posts are exactly 'Emily Chen' (Technical Director, Engineering, x402) and 'Marcus Johnson' (Creative Lead, Design, x415), as explicitly checked by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
